ham.subject: Upcoming IT Security Training – Please Confirm Attendance
ham.body:
Hello Team,

As part of our annual cybersecurity awareness program, we have scheduled a mandatory 2‑hour virtual training on July 15th from 10:00 AM to 12:00 PM Pacific Time. The session will cover password hygiene, phishing prevention, and secure device usage.

To register, please click the link below and fill out the short form. <URL>

If you have any scheduling conflicts, let me know and I’ll check for alternative times.

Thank you for helping keep our data safe.

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
IT Security Officer

spam.subject: Security Alert: Unusual Login Activity — Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have detected suspicious login attempts to your corporate account from an unknown device in Brazil. To protect your data, we are temporarily locking all access.

If this activity was authorized by you, verify your identity by clicking the link below within the next 30 minutes. Failure to act will result in permanent suspension of your account. <URL>

Please respond now to avoid potential data loss.

Regards,
Security Operations Team
